productDisplayName: Wrangler Men True Rider White T-shirt
description: Composition White T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Indulge in the fantasy of leaving civilisation far behind and travelling to wild forgotten places. This white T-shirt from wrangler is meant for the true adventurer. Team this with jeans for an outing alone or with friends. Add on a pair of stylish footwear and stay cool and comfortable through all seasons in this pure cotton tee. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height:6' and shoulders:18”
